guest_message: You are browsing as a guest
intro_title_1:
Life is short and the
world is
intro_desc: At Friends tours and travel, we customize reliable and trustworthy educational tours to destinations all over the world
project_description: This project is a mobile application built using Flutter. It demonstrates UI design, navigation, and mobile app development concepts learned in the Mobile Programming course.
hoi_an_description: Hoi An Ancient Town is a UNESCO World Heritage site famous for its preserved architecture and colorful lantern streets.
hoi_an_review: Beautiful lantern streets and peaceful river views.
hoi_an_tip: Best time to visit is evening when lanterns light up the river.
bay_mau_forest_description: Bay Mau Coconut Forest, also known as the Seven-acre Coconut Forest, is a famous eco-tourism destination near Hoi An. Visitors can ride basket boats through the lush coconut palm forest, watch traditional performances, and experience the unique river culture of central Vietnam.
bay_mau_forest_review: A fun and unique experience! Riding the basket boat through the coconut forest and watching the local performances was unforgettable.
ba_na_hills_description: Ba Na Hills is one of the most famous tourist destinations in Vietnam. It is known for the Golden Bridge held by giant stone hands and the world-class cable car system.
ba_na_hills_review: Ba Na Hills is a magical place with stunning views. The Golden Bridge and cable car ride are unforgettable.
lo_lo_chai_description: Lo Lo Chai Village is a beautiful traditional village near Lung Cu Flag Tower. It is home to the Lo Lo ethnic group with unique earthen houses and peaceful scenery.
lo_lo_chai_review: A peaceful and charming village with beautiful mountain scenery.
sapa_description: Sa Pa is a famous mountain town in northern Vietnam known for breathtaking rice terraces and rich ethnic culture.
sapa_review: Sa Pa is a stunning destination with beautiful landscapes and friendly local people.
my_khe_description: My Khe Beach is one of the most famous beaches in Da Nang, known for its long white sand and clear blue water.
my_khe_review: Clean beach with soft sand and amazing sunrise views.
ta_xua_description: Ta Xua is a famous mountain destination known for its sea of clouds and breathtaking landscapes.
ta_xua_review: An amazing place to see the sea of clouds.
son_tra_description: Son Tra Peninsula is a beautiful natural area with forests, mountains, and ocean views.
son_tra_review: A peaceful place with breathtaking views.
tam_dao_description: Tam Dao is a mountain town famous for cool weather and misty landscapes.
tam_dao_review: A perfect getaway from the busy city.
bali_description: Bali is a world-famous island known for beaches, temples, and culture.
gardens_description: Gardens By The Bay is a famous nature park with futuristic Supertree structures.
gardens_review: Incredible garden with stunning night light shows.
night_safari_description: Night Safari is the world's first nocturnal zoo where visitors can see animals active at night.
night_safari_review: A unique experience to see wild animals at night.
river_wonders_description: River Wonders is a river-themed wildlife park featuring animals from famous rivers around the world.
river_wonders_review: Interesting park with many rare animals including giant pandas.
pulau_ubin_description: Pulau Ubin preserves traditional village life and natural landscapes.
pulau_ubin_review: A peaceful escape from the busy city.
merlion_description: Merlion Park is home to Singapore’s iconic Merlion statue.
merlion_review: Great place for photos with fantastic views.
namsan_description: N Seoul Tower offers panoramic views of the city from Namsan Mountain.
namsan_review: A romantic spot with amazing views of Seoul.
cheonggyecheon_description: A modern urban stream running through downtown Seoul.
cheonggyecheon_review: A peaceful walking path with beautiful lights at night.
haeundae_description: The most famous beach in Busan with a wide sandy shore.
haeundae_review: Beautiful beach perfect for summer vacation.
bukchon_description: Bukchon Hanok Village is a traditional Korean village in Seoul with hundreds of preserved hanok houses. It offers a glimpse into Korea’s historical architecture and culture.
bukchon_review: A charming village with beautiful traditional houses. Great place to experience Korean culture.
fuji_description: Mount Fuji is the highest mountain in Japan and a famous symbol of the country. It attracts visitors with its perfect cone shape and breathtaking scenery.
fuji_review: Magnificent mountain with stunning views. One of the most iconic places in Japan.
tokyo_tower_description: Tokyo Tower is a famous landmark inspired by the Eiffel Tower. It offers observation decks with amazing views of Tokyo city.
tokyo_tower_review: A classic Tokyo attraction with great city views, especially beautiful at night.
kinkakuji_description: Kinkaku-ji, also known as the Golden Pavilion, is a famous Zen temple in Kyoto covered in gold leaf. It reflects beautifully on the surrounding pond.
kinkakuji_review: Absolutely stunning temple with a golden exterior. A must-see spot in Kyoto.
bay_mau_forest_tip: Take a basket boat ride through the coconut forest.
ba_na_hills_tip: Visit early morning to avoid crowds.
lo_lo_chai_tip: Explore the traditional houses of the Lo Lo ethnic group.
sapa_tip: Best season is September during rice harvest.
my_khe_tip: Sunrise is the best time to enjoy the beach.
ta_xua_tip: Come early morning to see the sea of clouds.
son_tra_tip: Ride motorbike to enjoy coastal mountain views.
tam_dao_tip: Perfect place to escape summer heat.
bali_tip: Visit temples during sunset for amazing views.
gardens_tip: Stay until night to see the light show.
night_safari_tip: Take the tram ride to explore the park at night.
river_wonders_tip: Visit in the morning to avoid crowds.
pulau_ubin_tip: Rent a bicycle to explore the island.
merlion_tip: Visit at sunset for the best photos.
namsan_tip: Visit at night for city lights.
cheonggyecheon_tip: Best time is evening when lights turn on.
bukchon_tip: Visit early morning to avoid crowds.
fuji_tip: Visit during autumn for clear views.
tokyo_tower_tip: Visit at sunset for best view.
kinkakuji_tip: Visit early morning for fewer tourists.
